john

echo -n "password123" | md5sum

nano hash.txt

copy this in hash.txt:
"what ever hash is generated by previous command"

cat hash.txt

nano wordlist.txt

copy this in wordlist.txt:
admin
welcome
password
password123
qwerty

cat wordlist.txt

john --wordlist=wordlist.txt --format=Raw-MD5 hash.txt

john --show --format=Raw-MD5 hash.txt
